instructions: Locate the 'Install dependencies' step within the 'test' job in `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml`.
Add the package `python-yaml` to the list of packages installed via the `pacman -Sy` command to enable full YAML syntax validation in `tests/verify_build_profile.sh`.
constraints: Do NOT modify the bash logic inside `tests/verify_build_profile.sh` or any other test scripts.
Do NOT modify any executable code in the `airootfs/` directory.
Limit the scope exactly to modifying the package installation command.
